title: pavonia apiculata
intro: Pavonia apiculata, also known as the red sage or red pavonia, is a plant species in the mallow family (Malvaceae) that is native to Mexico and Central America. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, making it a potential treatment for various health issues. The health benefits of Pavonia apiculata include reducing inflammation and improving wound healing, as well as exerting antimicrobial and antifungal activities. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are used to treat a range of health conditions, including skin irritations and digestive issues.
